name: Florida Auto Pawn
description_short: Florida Auto Pawn is a pawn shop in Kissimmee, FL offering cash loans secured by vehicles and valuable items with a customer-focused approach.
description_long:
Florida Auto Pawn operates as a collateral-based lending service located in Kissimmee, Florida, in Osceola County. The business positions itself within the pawn shop category, providing quick access to cash by accepting vehicles and other valuables as collateral. According to their business profile, the company emphasizes a customer-oriented philosophy and encourages open communication about client needs and financial situations.

The company offers pawn services including cash loans against vehicles and other valuable items. Their service model includes transparent pricing and straightforward processes designed to help customers understand borrowing terms before committing. The business operates six days per week (Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM) and maintains a single location at 1101 Miranda Ln Suite 107 in Kissimmee. They also list themselves under auto repair services and car dealer categories, suggesting potential ancillary automotive services beyond core pawn lending.

Florida Auto Pawn distinguishes itself through emphasis on customer service quality and staff attentiveness. The available information indicates staff members are trained to be courteous and supportive, encouraging feedback and expressing willingness to address customer inquiries. The business profile notes a broad selection of auto-related items and services, suggesting they serve diverse customer automotive needs beyond simple cash lending.

Limitations in available data should be noted: The business has not completed owner verification on the listing platform, carries zero customer reviews, and specific information about interest rates, loan terms, maximum loan amounts, and eligibility requirements is not publicly detailed. The company appears relatively new or newly listed to this platform. Prospective customers should contact the business directly to understand current rates, specific loan limits based on collateral value, repayment terms, and any fees associated with pawn transactions.
pros: Open 6 days per week with extended hours (9 AM–5 PM Monday–Saturday)
Emphasis on transparent pricing and straightforward loan processes
Staff trained to be attentive, courteous, and responsive to customer needs
Accepts vehicles and various valuable items as collateral for loans
Customer-focused approach with willingness to address diverse inquiries
Located in Kissimmee with convenient Suite 107 address
Offers quick cash access without requiring credit checks
cons: Business has not completed owner verification on listing platform, raising transparency concerns
Zero customer reviews available, making service quality difficult to independently verify
Specific loan amounts, interest rates, and fees are not publicly disclosed
Limited publicly available information about repayment terms and default consequences
Website content is AI-generated summary rather than detailed company information
best_for: Vehicle owners needing immediate cash without credit checks
Individuals with valuable items seeking short-term collateral-based loans
People in Osceola County requiring quick access to funds for emergencies
diagnosis: Florida Auto Pawn is best suited for vehicle owners and individuals with valuables who need immediate cash and cannot qualify for traditional credit-based loans. The main caveat is the complete absence of customer reviews, lack of owner verification, and minimal publicly available information about specific loan terms, rates, and conditions—prospective borrowers should contact the business directly to understand exact terms before pledging collateral.
services: Cash loans secured by valuable items
